result.text:
Encounter seed.

Environment:
Storm-lashed waters between Caldor Island, the Island of Lights, and the Dragon's Teeth islands. Hidden coves, shipwreck graveyards, and shifting alliances define this dangerous maritime frontier.

What the party first notices:
wreckage bumps softly against hidden rocks in an unnatural rhythm.

Who or what is involved:
a pirate captain seeking temporary alliance.

What is actually happening:
one hidden route is no longer safe because the sea itself is changing.

Complication:
every witness wants ownership of the story.

GM Hook:
uncover who laid the trap and who profits from it.

STYLE:
painted british comic encounter illustration, gritty graphic novel action scene, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic composition, immediate tension, layered action, dark fantasy encounter art.
